queries.title: วันที่อนุมัติ น้อยกว่า วันที่จัดทำ
queries.sql:
with tmp as (
select distinct cr.created_Date::date, cr.approve_Date , ec.approve_Date ,
cr.site_id, cr.sys_id cheque_report_id , cr.cheque_report_no ,cr.budget_year
	from expense.laas_Exp_cheque_Report  cr
	join expense.laas_exp_dika_cheque dc on cr.sys_id = dc.cheque_report_id  and cr.site_id = dc.site_id
	 join expense.laas_Exp_cheque ec on dc.cheque_id  = ec.sys_id
	 join expense.laas_Exp_Dika d on d.sys_id = dc.dika_id
	where cr.budget_year >= 2568
	--and cr.site_id = '800EAA3A-7F97-421E-A2D7-06FA65E7CDFF'
	and cr.created_Date > '2025-03-01'
	and dc.status_flag not in ('C' , 'X' , 'Z')
	and ec.payment_receive_date is not null
	and cr.approve_Date::date  < cr.created_Date::date
	and ec.approve_date = cr.approve_Date
)
select  lsm.db_name, ls.site_code ,st.sitetype_name , ls.site_name , lp.province_name , la.amphur_name ,
tmp.*
from tmp 
join aim.laas_site ls on ls.sys_id = tmp.site_id
join aim.laas_site_type st on	st.sys_id = ls.site_type_id
join common.laas_province lp on	lp.sys_id = ls.province_id
join common.laas_amphur la on	la.sys_id = ls.amphur_id
join common.laas_site_mapping lsm on	lsm.site_id = ls.sys_id

queries.title: จ่ายแล้วสถานะฎีกาไม่ถูกต้อง
queries.sql:
select distinct lsm.db_name, ls.site_code ,st.sitetype_name , ls.site_name , lp.province_name , la.amphur_name,d.site_id
	, d.sys_id dika_id , d.dika_no  ,d.budget_year,d.dika_code , d.reference_doc_type  , d.cheque_flag  , d.allow_cheque_flag
	,dc.created_date dc_created_date , dc.status_flag dc_status_flag ,
	d.created_date d_created_date  , d.status_flag d_status_flag,d.status_cancel_flag,  d.updated_date  , d.updated_user_id  ,
	ec.created_Date ec_created_date , ec.status_flag ec_status_flag  ,ec.payment_receive_system_date,
        'update expense.laas_Exp_Dika  set ' ||
        'status_flag = ' ||   QUOTE_LITERAL('Q')  || ', ' ||
       'cheque_flag = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL('1')  || ', ' ||
       'updated_user_id = ' ||  QUOTE_LITERAL('SYSTEM')  || ', ' || 
       'updated_date =  CLOCK_TIMESTAMP() ' ||
       'where  sys_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL( d.sys_id  )  || ' ' ||
       'and dika_no =' || QUOTE_LITERAL( d.dika_no)  || ' ' ||
       'and site_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL( d.site_id)  || ' ' ||
       'and status_flag =' || QUOTE_LITERAL( d.status_flag)  || ' ' ||
       'and cheque_flag = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL( d.cheque_flag)   || ' ' ||
       'and status_cancel_flag = ' ||  QUOTE_LITERAL('N')  ||  ';' AS sql_query
	from expense.laas_Exp_dika_cheque dc
	join expense.laas_exp_Cheque ec on dc.cheque_id  = ec.sys_id
	join expense.laas_exp_dika d on dc.dika_id  = d.sys_id and dc.site_id  = d.site_id
        join common.laas_site_mapping lsm  on lsm.site_id = d.site_id
	join  aim.laas_site ls on dc.site_id  = ls.sys_id
        join aim.laas_site_type st on	st.sys_id = ls.site_type_id
	join common.laas_province lp on ls.province_id = lp.sys_id
	join common.laas_amphur la on la.sys_id = ls.amphur_id
	where d.budget_year  >= 2568
	--and ls.site_code like '1%'
	--and dc.site_id = 'FE96AEB1-0D29-45C8-9625-96C2C2EE0641'
	and ec.status_flag  not in ('X' , 'C' , 'Z')
	and ec.payment_receive_system_date  is not null
	--and d.dika_no = '68-03-00221-5340500-00004'
	and dc.created_date::date >= '2025-03-01'::date
	and d.status_flag = 'P' and d.cheque_flag = '0'
	;
queries.menu: บันทึกจ่ายเงิน
queries.category: สถานะฎีกาไม่ถูกต้อง

queries.title: เงินรับฝาก ref_doc_no ซ้ำกัน
queries.sql:
with Tmp as 
(
select   site_id , commondb_id ,amount  , split_part(ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1) ref_doc_no ,txn_type ,count(*) cnt
FROM common.laas_common_dbtxn
WHERE delete_flag = 'F'
AND budget_year >= 2568
and txn_type = 'EXP_APPROVE_CHEQUE'
group by site_id , commondb_id ,amount  , split_part(ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1),txn_type
having count(*)  > 1
)
select  lsm.db_name, ls.site_code ,st.sitetype_name , ls.site_name , lp.province_name , la.amphur_name ,
 txn.site_id ,txn.budget_year,c.dbname ,txn.commondb_id ,txn.amount  , d.request_amount ,split_part(txn.ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1)  , txn.ref_doc_no  , 
txn.created_user_id , txn.sys_id,txn.txn_date,txn.created_date,
'update  common.laas_common_dbtxn  set ' ||
'updated_user_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL('SYSTEM') || ', ' ||
'updated_date = CLOCK_TIMESTAMP(), ' ||
'delete_flag = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL('T') || ', ' ||
'delete_date = CLOCK_TIMESTAMP()  ' ||
'where delete_flag = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL('F') || ' ' ||
'and site_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL(txn.site_id )  || ' ' ||
'and commondb_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL(txn.commondb_id )  || ' ' ||
'and sys_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL(txn.sys_id)  || ' ' ||	
'and txn_type = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL('EXP_APPROVE_CHEQUE') || ' ' ||
'and created_user_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL(txn.created_user_id)|| ';' AS sql_query
 FROM Tmp 
 join common.laas_common_dbtxn txn on tmp.site_id = txn.site_id 
 		and tmp.commondb_id = txn.commondb_id 
 		and tmp.amount = txn.amount
 		and tmp.txn_type = txn.txn_type
 		and tmp.ref_doc_no = split_part(txn.ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1) 
 join common.laas_common_db c on c.sys_id = txn.commondb_id
left join expense.laas_Exp_Dika d on d.site_id = txn.site_id and d.dika_no = split_part(txn.ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1)
join aim.laas_site ls on ls.sys_id = txn.site_id
join aim.laas_site_type st on	st.sys_id = ls.site_type_id
join common.laas_province lp on	lp.sys_id = ls.province_id
join common.laas_amphur la on	la.sys_id = ls.amphur_id
join common.laas_site_mapping lsm on	lsm.site_id = ls.sys_id
WHERE txn.delete_flag = 'F'
  --AND txn.site_id = '95A6F794-86D0-4ACA-8EA4-4DB183858DB7'
  AND txn.budget_year >= 2568
  and txn.txn_type = 'EXP_APPROVE_CHEQUE'
  --AND txn.commondb_id = '75104FA8-3288-4D96-B217-BF27ECACB73C'
 -- and sys_id in (
 -- 		'C67AB26C-A83C-4BCD-9A2B-9BE558669504',
--		'D55EE49C-8A9E-4C24-8AF1-5F2C3FCCE2B5')
 -- group by site_id , commondb_id ,amount  , split_part(ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1)
 -- having count(*)  > 1
 ORDER BY txn.site_id ,split_part(txn.ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1) ,txn.created_user_id ,txn.created_date;
queries.menu: บันทึกจ่ายเงิน
queries.category: เงินรับฝาก

reports.title: Check site Sharding
reports.sql:
select lsm.db_name, st.sitetype_name  , ls.site_name  , ls.sys_id site_id , st.sitetype_type  , lp.province_name,la.amphur_name
from aim.laas_site ls
join aim.laas_site_type st on st.sys_id =ls.site_type_id
join common.laas_province lp  on lp.sys_id = ls.province_id
join common.laas_amphur la on la.sys_id = ls.amphur_id
join common.laas_site_mapping lsm  on lsm.site_id = ls.sys_id
where  1=1 
and (
({{siteName}} is not null and ls.site_name like {{siteName}} )
or ({{siteId}} is not null and ls.sys_id = {{siteId}} )
)

page3Reports.title: เงินรับฝาก-ซ้ำกัน
page3Reports.sql:
select   site_id , commondb_id ,amount  , split_part(ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1) ,count(*) cnt
  FROM common.laas_common_dbtxn
 WHERE delete_flag = 'F'
   AND site_id = {{siteId}}
   AND budget_year >= 2568
   and txn_type = 'EXP_APPROVE_CHEQUE'
  -- AND commondb_id = 'B5A6F622-AF01-4476-8C48-29FC02226B72'
   group by site_id , commondb_id ,amount  , split_part(ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1)
   having count(*)  > 1
-- ORDER BY split_part(ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1) ,created_user_id;

checkSiteReports.title: CheckSite
checkSiteReports.sql:
select lsm.db_name,	st.sitetype_name ,	ls.site_name ,	ls.sys_id site_id ,
st.sitetype_type ,	lp.province_name,	la.amphur_name
from aim.laas_site ls
join aim.laas_site_type st on	st.sys_id = ls.site_type_id
join common.laas_province lp on	lp.sys_id = ls.province_id
join common.laas_amphur la on	la.sys_id = ls.amphur_id
join common.laas_site_mapping lsm on	lsm.site_id = ls.sys_id
where  1 = 1
and ( ({{siteName}} is not null  and ls.site_name like {{siteName}} )
	or ( {{siteId}} is not null	and ls.sys_id = {{siteId}} ) )

fixIpReports.title: Query Description
fixIpReports.sql: select lsm.db_name, ls.site_code ,st.sitetype_name , ls.site_name , lp.province_name , la.amphur_name , *--distinct A.site_id ,A.cheque_report_id , A.cheque_report_no from ( select distinct cr.created_Date::date, cr.approve_Date , ec.approve_Date , cr.site_id, cr.sys_id cheque_report_id , cr.cheque_report_no ,cr.budget_year--, d.cancel_date , ec.approve_date , ec.cheque_submitted_date , d.status_cancel_flag , dc.dika_id,d.work_accept_id , dc.payment_amount --, d.dika_amount , d.request_amount , --de.dr_cr_amount, --d.dika_code , d.reference_doc_type --,dc.dika_cheque_group_id , dc.cheque_id , ec.payment_receive_system_date --,d.sys_id dika_id ,d.dika_no , d.sys_id , d.dika_code , d.reference_doc_type ,dc.sys_id --,de.sys_id , j.document_no , j.approved_flag , j.descriptions -- ,cr.status_flag , dc.status_flag , ec.status_Flag from expense.laas_Exp_cheque_Report cr join expense.laas_exp_dika_cheque dc on cr.sys_id = dc.cheque_report_id and cr.site_id = dc.site_id join expense.laas_Exp_cheque ec on dc.cheque_id = ec.sys_id join expense.laas_Exp_Dika d on d.sys_id = dc.dika_id --left join account.laas_acc_cash_payments_journal j on j.site_id = d.site_id --and j.ref_doc_id = dc.dika_cheque_group_id and d.sys_id = j.dika_id --left join account.laas_acc_cash_payments_journal_detail de on j.sys_id = de.cash_payments_journal_id and de.dr_cr_flag = 'Cr' where 1=1 --cheque_Report_no in ( '000143/68' , '000156/68') --and cr.site_id = '800EAA3A-7F97-421E-A2D7-06FA65E7CDFF' and cr.budget_year >= 2568 and cr.created_Date > '2025-03-01' and dc.status_flag not in ('C' , 'X' , 'Z') and ec.payment_receive_date is not null and cr.approve_Date::date < cr.created_Date::date and ec.approve_date = cr.approve_Date --and d.request_amount <> de.dr_cr_amount )A join aim.laas_site ls on ls.sys_id = A.site_id join aim.laas_site_type st on st.sys_id = ls.site_type_id join common.laas_province lp on lp.sys_id = ls.province_id join common.laas_amphur la on la.sys_id = ls.amphur_id join common.laas_site_mapping lsm on lsm.site_id = ls.sys_id

fixIpReports.title: step3-เงินรับฝาก group -list
fixIpReports.sql:
with Tmp as 
(
select   site_id , commondb_id ,amount  , split_part(ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1) ref_doc_no ,txn_type ,count(*) cnt
FROM common.laas_common_dbtxn
WHERE delete_flag = 'F'
AND budget_year >= 2568
and txn_type = 'EXP_APPROVE_CHEQUE'
group by site_id , commondb_id ,amount  , split_part(ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1),txn_type
having count(*)  > 1
)
select  lsm.db_name, ls.site_code ,st.sitetype_name , ls.site_name , lp.province_name , la.amphur_name ,
 txn.site_id ,c.dbname ,txn.commondb_id ,txn.amount  , split_part(txn.ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1)  , txn.ref_doc_no  , 
txn.created_user_id , txn.sys_id,
'update  common.laas_common_dbtxn  set ' ||
'updated_user_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL('SYSTEM') || ', ' ||
'updated_date = CLOCK_TIMESTAMP(), ' ||
'delete_flag = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL('T') || ', ' ||
'delete_date = CLOCK_TIMESTAMP()  ' ||
'where delete_flag = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL('F') || ' ' ||
'and site_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL(txn.site_id )  || ' ' ||
'and commondb_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL(txn.commondb_id )  || ' ' ||
'and sys_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL(txn.sys_id)  || ' ' ||	
'and txn_type = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL('EXP_APPROVE_CHEQUE') || ' ' ||
'and created_user_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL(txn.created_user_id)|| ';' AS sql_query
 FROM Tmp 
 join common.laas_common_dbtxn txn on tmp.site_id = txn.site_id 
 		and tmp.commondb_id = txn.commondb_id 
 		and tmp.amount = txn.amount
 		and tmp.txn_type = txn.txn_type
 		and tmp.ref_doc_no = split_part(txn.ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1) 
 join common.laas_common_db c on c.sys_id = txn.commondb_id
join aim.laas_site ls on ls.sys_id = txn.site_id
join aim.laas_site_type st on	st.sys_id = ls.site_type_id
join common.laas_province lp on	lp.sys_id = ls.province_id
join common.laas_amphur la on	la.sys_id = ls.amphur_id
join common.laas_site_mapping lsm on	lsm.site_id = ls.sys_id
WHERE txn.delete_flag = 'F'
  --AND txn.site_id = '95A6F794-86D0-4ACA-8EA4-4DB183858DB7'
  AND txn.budget_year >= 2568
  and txn.txn_type = 'EXP_APPROVE_CHEQUE'
  --AND txn.commondb_id = '75104FA8-3288-4D96-B217-BF27ECACB73C'
 -- and sys_id in (
 -- 		'C67AB26C-A83C-4BCD-9A2B-9BE558669504',
--		'D55EE49C-8A9E-4C24-8AF1-5F2C3FCCE2B5')
 -- group by site_id , commondb_id ,amount  , split_part(ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1)
 -- having count(*)  > 1
 ORDER BY txn.site_id ,split_part(txn.ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1) ,txn.created_user_id;
fixIpReports.category: เงินรับฝาก

fixIpReports.title: step3-เงินรับฝาก-list
fixIpReports.sql:
select   site_id , commondb_id ,amount  , split_part(ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1)  , ref_doc_no  , created_user_id , sys_id,
'update  common.laas_common_dbtxn  set ' ||
'updated_user_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL('SYSTEM') || ', ' ||
'updated_date = CLOCK_TIMESTAMP(), ' ||
'delete_flag = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL('T') || ', ' ||
'delete_date = CLOCK_TIMESTAMP()  ' ||
'where delete_flag = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL('F') || ' ' ||
'and site_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL(site_id )  || ' ' ||
'and commondb_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL(commondb_id )  || ' ' ||
'and sys_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL(sys_id)  || ' ' ||	
'and txn_type = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL('EXP_APPROVE_CHEQUE') || ' ' ||
'and created_user_id = ' || QUOTE_LITERAL(created_user_id)|| ';' AS sql_query
 FROM common.laas_common_dbtxn
WHERE delete_flag = 'F'
  AND site_id = '95A6F794-86D0-4ACA-8EA4-4DB183858DB7'
  AND budget_year >= 2568
  and txn_type = 'EXP_APPROVE_CHEQUE'
  AND commondb_id = '75104FA8-3288-4D96-B217-BF27ECACB73C'
 -- and sys_id in (
 -- 		'C67AB26C-A83C-4BCD-9A2B-9BE558669504',
--		'D55EE49C-8A9E-4C24-8AF1-5F2C3FCCE2B5')
 -- group by site_id , commondb_id ,amount  , split_part(ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1)
 -- having count(*)  > 1
 ORDER BY split_part(ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1) ,created_user_id;
fixIpReports.category: เงินรับฝาก

fixIpReports.title: step2-เงินรับฝาก-group
fixIpReports.sql:
select   site_id , commondb_id ,amount  , split_part(ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1) ,count(*) cnt
 FROM common.laas_common_dbtxn
WHERE delete_flag = 'F'
  --AND site_id = '95A6F794-86D0-4ACA-8EA4-4DB183858DB7'
  AND budget_year >= 2568
  and txn_type = 'EXP_APPROVE_CHEQUE'
 -- AND commondb_id = 'B5A6F622-AF01-4476-8C48-29FC02226B72'
 -- and sys_id in (
 -- 		'C67AB26C-A83C-4BCD-9A2B-9BE558669504',
--		'D55EE49C-8A9E-4C24-8AF1-5F2C3FCCE2B5')
  group by site_id , commondb_id ,amount  , split_part(ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1)
  having count(*)  > 1
-- ORDER BY split_part(ref_Doc_no, ' (', 1) ,created_user_id;

fixIpCategories: เงินรับฝาก
